1: Thou hast brought back the captivity of Jacob.
2: Thou hast covered all their sin. Selah. Selah.
3: Thou hast turned thyself thyself from the fierceness of thine anger.
4: And cause thine anger toward us to cease.
5: Wilt thou draw out thine anger to all generations?
6: That thy people may rejoice in thee?
8: For he will speak peace unto his people, and to his saints: But let them not turn again to folly.
9: That glory may dwell in our land.
10: Righteousness and peace have kissed each other each other .
11: And righteousness shall look down from heaven.
12: And our land shall yield her increase.
13: And shall set us us in the way of his steps.
